headline: Powell Industries (POWL) Price Target Increased to $360 by JPMorgan
summary: Powell Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ:POWL) is one of the 10 Best Industrial Stocks Benefiting from the Data Center Boom. According to a report by TheFly on May 7, JPMorgan increased its price target on Powell to $360 from $310 while maintaining an Overweight rating on the shares, following the company’s second quarter earnings report.
